headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -76.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 29% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 130 quotes and exceptional intensity - 104 strong-intensity comments are driving people to vent aggressively today.

• At 71.6, frustration levels sit in the upper half of the 122-day range, showing sustained public irritation.

• Both fears and optimism dropped further into negative territory, with optimism hitting particularly low levels compared to yesterday.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
